data.body:
=== CONSOLIDATED HANDOFF (epic 6982 full-execute, session state) ===
WORKTREE: .claude/worktrees/cal-6982 on branch calib/6982-execute, base origin/main 43d15452 (fast-forwarded). Commits: 47d6972 (R6) + d5ec73bc (R7 stacked). venv active; REBAR_SESSION_ID=cal6982-fullexec.
DONE/IMPLEMENTED: R6 (5dac, advisory-triage) commit 47d6972 -> Gerrit #760 [LLM-Review +1; Verified BLOCKED by flaky CI, 5-6x]. R7 (b1a4, gate-eval instrumentation) commit d5ec73bc -> Gerrit #761 [FULLY GREEN: LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1], stacked on #760.
PLAN-REVIEW PASSED (attestations signed, ready to CLAIM): E2 (d125 seeded-defect benchmark), E6 (a880 judge reliability). E3 (def5 counterfactual replay) on round-8 (should pass). Draft plans in job tmp/e{2,3,6}_desc.md (already applied to tickets).
NOT STARTED: E5 (5342, cross-gate non-regression) DEFERRED — co-design with R5 (both need asserted_capability_confirmed which R5 adds). R1(59b7)/R3(3a27)/R4(03a9)/R2(b080)/R5(ea39) plans NOT rewritten yet (still terse epic-setup versions — will need the same grounded-rewrite treatment). 
BLOCKERS: (1) FLAKY MAIN CI blocks ALL landing (every R-story needs Verified+1): test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes (write-loss race), code-review sidecar git-object race, benchmark commit-count int('') — green locally, plausibly identity-rollout signing regression; needs MAINTAINER fix/quarantine. (2) Eval RUN phase (E2/E3/E6 harness impl + run) = large multi-session LLM spend.
RESUME PLAN: once CI fixed -> Submit R6->R7 stack (submit #761 pulls #760) -> close R6+R7 tickets (Verified+1 first). Then: claim E2/E6/E3 -> implement harnesses (docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/, verified gate-run mechanism = REBAR_TRACKER_DIR clone + review_plan source=local sign=False emit_sidecar=False force=True) -> run evals -> writeups -> close. Then gated R1/R3/R5 per results (INCONCLUSIVE-GATE RULE: eval fail => defer). Then R2/R4, E5+R5. EPIC AC#1 references DESCOPED finding-adjudication/kappa corpus -> reconcile at close (only outcome-corpus part valid). Key verified mechanisms recorded in earlier log entries (R7 classifier, E2/E3/E6 gate-run recipe).
